name: Ontario Mild Cheddar Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Ontario mild cheddar cheese, grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 3 tablespoons of butter in a saucepan over low heat.
2. Add the vegetables (grated carrots, celery, onion, parsnip) to the saucepan. Cover and simmer for 10 minutes.
3. In a separate bowl, blend 2 tablespoons of butter with flour until smooth.
4. Add the butter-flour mixture to the vegetable mixture in the saucepan. Stir well until creamy.
5. Continue cooking over low heat for about 5-8 minutes.
6. Gradually add grated cheddar cheese (up to 3 cups) and stir until fully melted.
7. Slowly incorporate cold milk into the soup, stirring continuously.
8. Cook for another 10 minutes without boiling after adding the milk.
9. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
10. Stir in a handful of chopped parsley before serving.
